name: inventario-qa-e2e
description: Suite de testes E2E do inventario (Cypress + TypeScript).

scripts.cy:run:regression: env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE -u ELECTRON_NO_ATTACH_CONSOLE cypress run --env grepTags=@regression
scripts.cy:run:extended: env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE -u ELECTRON_NO_ATTACH_CONSOLE cypress run --env grepTags=@extended
scripts.cy:run:chrome: env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE -u ELECTRON_NO_ATTACH_CONSOLE cypress run --browser chrome
scripts.report:open: xdg-open cypress/reports/html/index.html || open cypress/reports/html/index.html || start cypress/reports/html/index.html
scripts.cy:run:report: npm run report:clean && npm run cy:run && npm run report:merge && npm run report:generate
scripts.cy:run:regression:report: npm run report:clean && npm run cy:run:regression && npm run report:merge && npm run report:generate
scripts.cy:run:extended:report: npm run report:clean && npm run cy:run:extended && npm run report:merge && npm run report:generate
